title: elatostema brachyodontum subsp. lengshuiheensis
intro: Elatostema brachyodontum subsp. lengshuiheensis is a subspecies of the Elatostema brachyodontum plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. It is native to the region of Yunnan in China and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elatostema brachyodontum subsp. lengshuiheensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
